HGSS.603.0000:
Ecruteak used to have two towers,
one in the east and one in the west.
HGSS.603.0001:
Have you heard that they are talking
about rebuilding the Burned Tower?\f
There will be two towers again!
I’m looking forward to it!
HGSS.603.0002:
Hmm...
I thought I just heard a woman\r
screaming or something...\f
Is that just me?
HGSS.603.0003:
Kimono Girls are always rehearsing their
dances at the Dance Theater there.
HGSS.603.0004:
I’m going to rehearse at the
Dance Theater. Care to join me?
HGSS.603.0005:
The tower that used to be here...
I heard that it used to be much taller\r
before it was burned by a fire.
HGSS.603.0006:
Three big Pokémon ran off in different
directions. What were they?
HGSS.603.0007:
They say that they will start the
construction work to rebuild this\r
tower soon!
HGSS.603.0008:
Oh!
That’s a nice Pokémon you’re walking\r
with! They make you feel uplifted,\r
don’t they?\f
They give us the hope of the light,
so to speak.\f
Speaking of the light, I heard something
about the Lighthouse in Olivine.\f
The Pokémon that serves as the
beacon has fallen ill.\r
Sounds like it’s in trouble.
HGSS.603.0009:
The Pokémon at that Lighthouse in
Olivine has fully recovered.\f
I heard that boats can safely sail out
to sea at night again.
HGSS.603.0010:
If you go west from this city, you’ll
reach a port called Olivine City.\f
When your Pokémon learns Surf,
you can go out to the ocean from\r
Route 40 without a ship!
HGSS.603.0012:
Ecruteak City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Morty\r
The Mystic Seer of the Future
HGSS.603.0014:
Burned Tower
It was destroyed by a mysterious fire.\f
Please stay away, as it is unsafe.
HGSS.603.0015:
Barrier Station to Bell Tower
No Trespassing by the Unworthy
HGSS.603.0017:
[0103,0001,0000]: How...? How is this
possible? How can I lose to\r
mere Kimono Girls...?\f
HGSS.603.0018:
[0103,0001,0000]: You were watching me,
[0103,0000,0000]...\f
Yeah, that’s right!\f
I never thought defeating five Kimono
Girls would be so hard...\f
I got beaten to a pulp...\f
...\f
You must have come here for the same
reason, right?\f
Don’t get cocky just because you
defeated Team Rocket!\f
These Kimono Girls are insanely strong.\f
Go ahead! See if you can defeat them.\f
But I’m not going back.
I don’t want to see you win.\f
HGSS.603.0019:
In the distant past...\f
When this tower burned in a fire,
three nameless Pokémon perished in it.\f
Then, a rainbow-hued Pokémon
descended from the sky and\r
somehow brought them back...\f
The people were afraid of power such as
the rainbow-hued Pokémon had shown.\f
They tried to control it by force.\f
The nameless Pokémon made no attempt
to fight back. Instead, their\r
great sorrow compelled them to leave.\f
This legend has been passed down
by the Ecruteak Gym Leader. Me?\f
I was a Trainer way back when.
Ho ho ho!
